Treatment of Hypercholesterolemia
LIPOFEN™ is indicated as adjunctive therapy to diet to reduce elevated LDL-C, Total-
C, Triglycerides and Apo B, and to increase HDL-C in adult patients with primary
hypercholesterolemia or mixed dyslipidemia (Fredrickson Types IIa and IIb).
